title: Error Cluster
description: A governed cluster of error classification records grouped by recurring failure pattern. Output of the AV Auto-Failure Clustering system.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this cluster was created.

taxonomy_version.description: Version of the error taxonomy catalog used when clustering.

primary_error_code.description: The most frequent error code in this cluster.

secondary_error_codes.description: Other error codes that co-occur with the primary code in this cluster.

dominant_family.description: The error family code that dominates this cluster (e.g. GROUND, REASON).

cluster_signature.description: Canonical signature uniquely identifying the failure pattern.

record_count.description: Number of classification records in this cluster.

weighted_severity_score.description: Sum of (severity_weight × confidence) across all classification entries.

avg_confidence.description: Average confidence across all classification entries in this cluster.

artifact_types.description: Mapping of artifact_type → count of records.

pass_types.description: Mapping of pass_type → count of records.

source_systems.description: Mapping of source_system → count of records.

context_distribution.description: Distribution of contextual attributes across records in this cluster.

remediation_targets.description: Unique remediation targets derived from taxonomy entries in this cluster (e.g. prompt, grounding, retrieval).

representative_examples.description: Top representative classification records illustrating this cluster.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this cluster.

error_codes.description: Error codes present in this example record.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation from the classification entry.
